title: Simple backpacks plugin
description: Simple backpack plugin made for anyone to know how to use.
body:
# Simple Backpacks
Backpacks that just work.

## Installing
To install download the **.jar** from Modrinth and place in the **plugins** folder. That's it their is no config or premissions that need to be added.

## Using
To use the backpack open your inventory and left click on the backpack.


## Upgrading backpack
Upgrading a backpack creates a new page in your backpack.

To upgrade the backpack open your inventory and right click the backpack then place in **64 copper ingots** and **5 daimonds**

## Notice
It may work on other server loaders but only tested on paper
